svg.title: Marlie 2.5 MW block — Rev 3
svg.desc: Rev 3 updates: engine-tier N+1 (3x Cat G3520K, 2 running + 1 standby); in-row rack N+1 (5x Delta 660 kW = 3.3 MW capacity); per-engine emissions package (SCR + oxidation catalyst + CEMS); Munters MX3 air treatment restored; resolved air architecture (internal recirc AHU with FW coil + separate small makeup DOAS); gas supply chain shown; utility/startup tap and adjacent-block tie on the Porch; cooling aux BBU for ride-through; widened FW delta-T (15F); non-crossing FW supply/return routing; block power and heat balance table.
svg.text: Engine N+1 · 3,300 kW installed · per-engine emissions · recirc air + makeup DOAS · adiabatic cooler · Munters DSS Pro
Fuel train manifold · per-engine SSOV + leak test + ESD + trim regulator
AC paralleling · sync check · protection relays · main breakers · metering · ATS (utility—gen) · block tie-breaker
Block aux distribution (480V AC): tower feed · BMS power · service panels · critical-aux BBU bus
3,300 kW installed · 9 compute racks · factory-built · sealed IP54 envelope
In-row power rack — 5× Delta 660 kW = 3,300 kW installed
All 5 active · parallel load-sharing · 2,400 kW embedded BBU
480V AC → 800V DC · BBU + supercap · sub-100 ms GPU load smoothing
• 9× NVL72 compute racks + 1 control rack (IB + mgmt)
• Delta 800V→50V DC/DC shelves in compute racks
• PG25 sealed loop → Stäubli QD ECP → external CDU skid
• Recirc air loop to cooling cassette (~14% of IT to air)
• Makeup air from DOAS for positive pressure only
• NVIDIA Mission Control · rack leak detect
• Sealed envelope · IP54 · controlled air ports only
• ECP: PG25 · recirc air · makeup air · signals
• Structured cable tray top · ISO corner lifting
• Commissioning to L5 factory burn-in pre-ship
• DMX-24 OPC UA out to cooling cassette
Heat exchange · air recirc + makeup · controls · aux BBU
Recirc AHU (Munters DSS Pro) — air-to-FW coil (sealed compute envelope)
IN: ~35°C warm return air from compute · OUT: 20°C / 45% RH supply
350 kW (~14% of IT) · MERV-13 · dehumid trim · regen: CHP jacket water (TBD)
PG25 — FW plate-frame HX · ~2.6 MW duty · LMTD ~12 K
• PG25 + FW pumps (N+1 each) · VFD-driven · loops rated above 350 kW demand
• 2.5 m³ PG25 buffer tank · expansion + glycol feeder
• 40 μm bag filtration · air separator · instruments
• Leak detect + auto-isolate on all loops
• Commissioning to L4 pre-ship · field trim to compute
• Drops to FW supply/return headers via flanged tap
Duty target: 2.6 MW rejection + 350 kW air + 125 kW OA
gen. power only — no CHP thermal recovery
Adiabatic fluid cooler — 1 unit · ~750 RT rejection
EVAPCO EAW-DA / BAC Trillium / SPX OlympusMAX / Güntner VARIO
2.6 MW duty · 110°F FW return → 95°F FW supply · 15°F approach @ 80°F WB
Dry most of year · adiabatic wet mode above 78°F WB · VFD EC fans
~90 kW electrical (fans + spray pumps) · outdoor pad · BBU-backed
Block power & heat balance — 2.5 MW IT, 2 gensets running + 1 standby (N+1)
IT load (9× Vera Rubin NVL72 compute + 1 control rack)
Primary design load · W45 DLC + residual air
In-row power rack losses (98% eff, 5 units)
Captured by PG25 loop via cold-plate-style heatsinks
Motor heat to fluid · pump eff ~80%
Recirc AHU fans + FW coil (Munters DSS Pro)
~14% of IT via plate HX · regen heat: CHP jacket water (TBD)
Positive-pressure OA only · not in main heat path
Porch aux · BMS · lighting · controls · SCR urea pump
Genset loading: 2 × 2 MW = 4 MW, ~69% · #3 standby = N+1
